# Attachable Access Entity Profile (AAEP)

Get default properties of [all](./AaepAllDefault.md) AAEPs in selected APIC.

Filter options:
  - [name](./AaepName.md)

Output options:
  - [default](./AaepAllDefault.md)
  - [json](./AaepOutputJson.md)

Command options

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_aaep.help:output
```
